selections.name: Olazabal
selections.reason: Massive class edge dropping from Saratoga and Churchill Downs. Speed figure of 102 dominates this field, and the NYRA shipper angle is potent here.

selections.name: Aula
selections.reason: Another strong shipper with back class from Aqueduct and Saratoga. 97 speed figure puts him right in the mix if the top choice falters.

selections.name: Cascade Cruiser
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 98 speed figure and a 90 class rating. Should get a good stalking trip.

selections.name: O P Firecracker
selections.reason: Draws the rail and has tactical speed. 97 speed figure makes him a logical underneath play in exotics.

danger_horse.name: Big Rich
danger_horse.reason: Capable of hitting the board on his best day, but needs a pace meltdown.

selections.name: Signifying Nothing
selections.reason: Ships in from Aqueduct, triggering the downstate shipper upgrade. 90 speed and 92 class rating make her the one to beat.

selections.name: Observer
selections.reason: Inside draw in a 6-furlong sprint is a huge advantage at Finger Lakes. Highest class rating in the field (97).

selections.name: Lady Banker
selections.reason: Solid 91 speed figure and projects to get a clean trip from the middle of the gate.

selections.name: World Bank
selections.reason: Draws well inside and has a 90 speed figure. Should be forwardly placed.

danger_horse.name: Maize Loved Laffy
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and could surprise if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Katie King
selections.reason: Strong NYRA/Tampa shipper with a 99 speed figure. Class relief here makes her extremely dangerous.

selections.name: Ekwanok
selections.reason: Boasts a 98 speed figure and a 100 class rating. Very consistent and will be right there at the wire.

selections.name: Last Glory
selections.reason: Aqueduct shipper with a 101 class rating. The rail draw is beneficial for this route distance.

selections.name: Book Of Wisdom
selections.reason: Dropping in from Laurel and Aqueduct. 92 speed figure is competitive for the bottom of exotics.

selections.name: First Pitch
selections.reason: Massive class edge dropping from Saratoga and Aqueduct. 100 speed figure is tops in the field.

selections.name: Hey Pal
selections.reason: Another strong Aqueduct shipper with a 99 class rating. Will be closing late.

selections.name: Isola D'oro
selections.reason: NYRA shipper with a 97 class rating. Should get a ground-saving trip from post 2.

selections.name: White Sport Coat
selections.reason: Tampa shipper with a 98 speed figure and 99 class. Fits well in this spot.

danger_horse.name: Sweet Tone
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and a 99 speed figure make him a threat to wire the field.

selections.name: Follow Your Arrow
selections.reason: Saratoga/Aqueduct shipper taking a massive class drop. 94 speed figure makes her the clear standout.

selections.name: Ace Up Her Sleeve
selections.reason: Ties for the top speed figure (94) and should get a good stalking trip just outside the speed.

selections.name: Carol Said No
selections.reason: Solid 92 speed figure and 80 class rating. Outside draw is tricky but has the tactical speed to overcome it.

selections.name: Kaymus
selections.reason: 91 speed figure and draws well inside. Can hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Diva Banker
danger_horse.reason: Consistent runner with a 91 speed figure, but the outside post in a sprint is a negative.

selections.name: Blue Eyed Scout
selections.reason: NYRA shipper (Aqueduct/Saratoga) dropping to the bottom. 92 speed figure is superior here.

selections.name: Cozee Magic
selections.reason: 90 speed figure and 86 class rating. Should be rolling late.

selections.name: Adjustable Rate
selections.reason: Inside speed dominance angle applies here. Rail draw in a sprint with an 88 speed figure makes her very dangerous.

selections.name: Only In My Dreams
selections.reason: Solid 88 speed figure and a good middle draw.

danger_horse.name: Cue The Music
danger_horse.reason: Has a 90 speed figure on her best day, could wake up here.

selections.name: Muscle Shoals
selections.reason: Massive 115 class rating dropping in from Aqueduct. 96 speed figure makes him the class of the field.

selections.name: Lord King
selections.reason: Another strong Aqueduct shipper with a 106 class rating and 97 speed. Inside draw is a big plus.

selections.name: Price Is Truth
selections.reason: Belmont at the Big A shipper with a 100 speed figure. Very dangerous.

selections.name: Without Pretence
selections.reason: Ships in from tougher circuits (GP/MTH) with a 101 speed figure.

danger_horse.name: Nyikos
danger_horse.reason: Tampa shipper with a 100 speed figure. Could upset if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Lady Meringue
selections.reason: Aqueduct shipper drawing the rail in a sprint. The inside speed dominance angle makes her the top pick.

selections.name: Peruvian Princess
selections.reason: 83 speed figure is competitive in this weak maiden claiming field.

selections.name: Joevia's Diva
selections.reason: Aqueduct shipper taking a drop. 85 class rating is solid for this level.

selections.name: Spicey Ticey
selections.reason: Another Aqueduct shipper getting class relief. Inside draw helps.
